touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Aiden Green at EastgateHealth regarding forecasting accuracy challenges. Aiden mentioned they're struggling with revenue predictability in their eCommerce ops and saw our automation platform could help. Confirmed fit for unlimited_automation tier given their workflow complexity. Scheduled technical eval for next week.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with our existing sales stack, specifically HubSpot and Stripe?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both HubSpot and Stripe, plus API access for custom workflows.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency around forecasting accuracy right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're in our planning cycle for Q2 and leadership needs better visibility into pipeline health. I just started as Head of RevOps two months ago and this is a priority initiative for me.

next_steps: Send calendar invite for technical eval session
Share case study from similar eCommerce company

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming technical eval scheduled for Thursday. Shared EastgateHealth-relevant case study (retail vertical, similar headcount). Aiden responded confirming attendance and asked if he could record the session for his team.

questions_asked.question: Can I record the technical eval session to share with my analytics team?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we encourage that. We'll also send you a recording link afterward.

next_steps: Prepare demo environment with eCommerce forecasting use case

touches.ai_summary: 57-minute technical evaluation with Aiden. Walked through forecasting dashboard, automation builder, and reporting capabilities. Aiden was engaged and took detailed notes. He mentioned wanting to pilot with his revenue team (9 seats confirmed). Expressed some concern about getting buy-in from CFO on budget timing, but seemed confident he could get approval. No other stakeholders joined the call despite our suggestion to include leadership.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 9 seats with unlimited automation tier, we typically see 2-3 weeks from kickoff to full deployment, including data migration and training.

questions_asked.question: Should we loop in your CFO or CEO for the next conversation given the budget cycle?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority for tools under $10k, so I can move forward. I'll brief the CFO once we're further along.

questions_asked.question: What does your customer success engagement look like post-launch?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have a dedicated CSM for onboarding, plus ongoing quarterly business reviews and 24/7 technical support.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller seat count and scale up?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, though the 9-seat tier gives you the best per-seat pricing. We can discuss flex options if needed.

objections: I need to make sure this fits within our Q2 budget allocation—timing might be tight.
next_steps: Send formal proposal with 9-seat unlimited_automation pricing
Schedule follow-up to review terms and answer remaining questions

touches.ai_summary: Email follow-up with formal proposal attached: $7,900 ACV, 9 seats, unlimited_automation tier. Included ROI breakdown based on forecasting accuracy improvements discussed in eval. Aiden responded same day saying the pricing looks reasonable and he's working through internal approvals. Asked about contract flexibility and payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer quarterly payment terms or is it annual upfront only?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer quarterly payments with a small processing fee, or annual upfront with a 5% discount. Happy to work with what fits your budget cycle best.

next_steps: Send contract with quarterly payment option
Check in early next week on approval status
